physical_anchor: Wiry, weather-hardened mountain build — lean shoulders, long sinewed forearms, and the bow-legged balance of a man raised on horseback; habitually stands a half-step behind and to the left of his master with one hand already near the bridle or the hilt, eyes tracking hands and thresholds rather than faces.
vocal_quality: Low, dry, slightly rasped chest-voice with clipped consonants and measured tempo, dropping into a softer deferential register only when addressing his agha.
social_presence: Occupies a room as a watchful absence — he reduces himself to furniture until the instant a threat appears, then becomes the one body between his master and the door.
